{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/5156054?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gabiudrescu/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gabiudrescu/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gabiudrescu/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gabiudrescu/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/gabiudrescu", "id": 5156054, "login": "gabiudrescu", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjUxNTYwNTQ=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gabiudrescu/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gabiudrescu/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gabiudrescu/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gabiudrescu/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gabiudrescu/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/gabiudrescu", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:P/VC:H/VI:H/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-306", "name": "Missing Authentication for Critical Function"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-352", "name": "Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-942", "name": "Permissive Cross-domain Security Policy with Untrusted Domains"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-1188", "name": "Initialization of a Resource with an Insecure Default"}], "description": "### Summary

The local HTTP server started by `engram server` (binding `127.0.0.1:7337` by default) was exposed to any browser origin with no authentication unless `ENGRAM_API_TOKEN` was explicitly set. Combined with `Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *` on every response and a body parser that did not require `Content-Type: application/json`, this allowed a malicious web page the developer visited to:

1. **Exfiltrate** the local knowledge graph via `GET /query` and `GET /stats` (function names, file layout, recorded decisions/mistakes).
2. **Inject persistent prompt-injection payloads** via `POST /learn`, which wrote `mistake`/`decision` nodes that were later surfaced as system-reminders to the user's AI coding agent on every future session and file edit.

Severity: **High** — confidentiality + persistent indirect prompt injection against the user's coding agent.

### Affected versions

`engramx` >= 1.0.0, < 2.0.2 — any version that shipped the HTTP server.

### Patched in

`engramx@2.0.2`

### Workarounds (if you cannot upgrade)

- Do **not** run `engram server` or `engram ui`.
- If developers must, set `ENGRAM_API_TOKEN` to a long random value and terminate the server before browsing the web.

### Remediation (applied in 2.0.2)

1. Fail-closed auth on every non-public route — Bearer header or HttpOnly cookie, constant-time comparison, 256-bit auto-generated token at `~/.engram/http-server.token` (0600).
2. Wildcard CORS removed entirely; default is no CORS headers. Opt-in allowlist via `ENGRAM_ALLOWED_ORIGINS`.
3. Host + Origin validation — rejects DNS rebinding and Host spoofing.
4. `Content-Type: application/json` enforced on mutations — blocks the text/plain CSRF vector.
5. `/ui?token=` bootstrap with `Sec-Fetch-Site` gate — prevents cross-origin oracle probing.

### Credit

Discovered and responsibly disclosed by @gabiudrescu in engram issue #7.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-2r2p-4cgf-hv7h", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-22T14:52:03Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2r2p-4cgf-hv7h", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-2r2p-4cgf-hv7h"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-22T14:52:03Z", "references": ["https://github.com/NickCirv/engram/security/advisories/GHSA-2r2p-4cgf-hv7h", "https://github.com/NickCirv/engram/issues/7", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2r2p-4cgf-hv7h"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/NickCirv/engram/security-advisories/GHSA-2r2p-4cgf-hv7h", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/NickCirv/engram", "summary": "engram: HTTP server CORS wildcard + auth-off-by-default enables CSRF graph exfiltration and persistent indirect prompt injection", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-23T10:04:15Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-2r2p-4cgf-hv7h", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.0.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "engramx"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.0.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: engram: HTTP server CORS wildcard + auth-off-by-default enables CSRF graph exfiltration and persistent indirect prompt injection
